title: Cinchcraft Legacy Version
description: Cinchcraft is a vanilla+ mod with tons of new features. It currently adds new blocks, items, and structures, as well as miscellaneous stuff like new wandering trader trades and new recipes. Cinchcraft is still under development!
body:
[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/sf01XOZ.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1088)

Cinchcraft is a vanilla+ mod with all of the features I have always wanted in the game. It currently adds new blocks, items, and structures, as well as miscellaneous stuff like new wandering trader trades and new recipes. I plan on adding hundreds more blocks and items, many more structures, new biomes, new mobs, new mechanics, and eventually new terrain generation.

This mod will not receive more updates since I have been splitting this mod into a series of much higher quality seperate mods. You can find all these new mods on my profile.

Features
-  Added 136 new building blocks made from vanilla materials.
-  Added 6 miscellaneous new blocks(some decorative, some functional).
-  Added 16 new structures. Many of these new structures come in a lot of different variants.
-   Added reeds and thatch blocks. Reeds are a new crop that can be found all around the overworld and can be crafted into thatch blocks which also have stair and slab variants. 
-  Added rubies. Ruby ore can be found in the overworld and very rarely in the nether. Rubies currently can only be made into a new armor(armor set is trimmable), tool set, a ruby block, and ruby horse armor. but in the       future more uses for rubies are planned. Ruby gear is in-between iron and diamond level. The next version of the mod will hopefully let you use rubies as an armor trim material.
-  Added more nether ores. Very rarely you can find nether versions of all overworld ores in the nether. The iron and copper ores drop nuggets like the vanilla nether gold ore.
-  Added a new azalea wood set, with all the corresponding wooden things you can craft from it. Azalea trees no longer use oak wood and instead use the new azalea wood.
-  Added beekeeper villager. Beekeeper village houses now spawn in plains, savanna, and taiga villages.
-  Overhauled sunflowers. Sunflowers are now a crop.
-  Added 13 new plants and crops that can be found all around the overworld. There's also one plant added to the nether, and one plant added to the end.
-  Added Blackstone and Deepslate tools.
-  Added 9 new food items.
-  Added 2 new Music discs which use 2 of Minecraft's unused sound tracks by C418.
-  Added 5 miscellaneous new items.
-  Added Glowing and Blindness Potions.
-  Many small tweaks, changes, and additions are also added.
-  Cinchcraft is also fully compatible with the JEI mod.
-  One new biome with many more biomes planned.

Feel Free to use this mod in modpacks!

PLEASE READ: Cinchcraft version 0.8-1.20.2 and higher require The Terrablender Mod: TerraBlender (Forge) - Minecraft Mods - CurseForge


If you want to play with just a few select features from this mod you can download Cinch's Better Deepslate: [https://modrinth.com/mod/cinchs-better-deepslate/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/cinchs-better-deepslate/versions)

I plan on making a bunch more mods like this that just add a few features from Cinchcraft.

 

Compatibility:

Cinchcraft includes a small compatibility patch for a Croptopia recipe. The compatibility patch changes the roasted sunflower seeds recipe in Croptopia so that it uses Cinchcraft's sunflower seed item instead of the vanilla sunflower item.

 

-Beekeeper Villager Texture and Some Block and Item Textures Made by Stallman.
